# ADR-0001: Problem-titled context

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-05

## Problem

Uses `## Problem` instead of `## Context` — a real-world Nygard variant
found running Gate G1 against an external repo (ADR-0004). Must NOT be
flagged as missing Context: "Problem" and "Problem Statement" are
recognized aliases.

## Decision

N/A — fixture file.

## Consequences

None — this is the negative control for the Context/Problem alias.
